name: Leaves of Fate
description: Take a look at how Project Misfits created a game in just 8 weeks.
author: Project Misfits

bio.long: We are a team of students from Worcester Polytechnic Institute who are working to make a 2D puzzle platformer in just 8 weeks.

location: Worcester, MA, United States of America
